summary: Tested the new /shop merch showcase (8 designs, notify dialog, valid/invalid email flows), backend /api/merch/notify (public + upsert + validation) and /api/admin/merch-interest (auth-gated, per-design tally), plus the nav change moving Champions from header into the modes-card and the new header-shop-link. All 6 backend pytest tests pass. All frontend flows verified end-to-end including admin panel showing the emails submitted from the shop UI (count=3, per-design tally correct).
critical_code_review_comments: Shop.jsx product_key is hardcoded to 'tee' on POST — regardless of which product tag the user is interested in. If tally-by-product-type is ever needed, capture the chosen product/size on the card before opening the dialog.

MerchInterest.jsx: `copy-merch-emails-btn` relies on navigator.clipboard which may be undefined on non-HTTPS/older browsers — currently guarded with optional chaining so it silently no-ops; consider a toast on success/failure.
merch.py /merch/notify: rate_limit(20) applies per-IP; fine for MVP but no per-email dedupe/protection against enumeration of the count field. Low priority for a showcase-only endpoint.
test_credentials: Admin password: GrimReaper!2026 (route /admin) — used and validated
seed_data_creation: Backend test inserted 2 TEST_ merch signups via /api/merch/notify (unique_email + one via UI). Verified upsert (duplicate does not increment count).
context_for_next_testing_agent: Merch showcase + admin merch-interest panel fully working. Previous iteration_72 covered Dragon's Hoard + guided ritual + GA4. Champions link is now inside modes-card as data-testid='crawl-champions-link'; header has data-testid='header-shop-link' (no more header-leaderboard-link). Note: opening /admin quickly may momentarily show count=0 before loadMerch resolves; a small wait_for_timeout after login is sufficient.
